title: Watch On-demand: Retail Ops Command Center webinar

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
At monday.com Elevate in NYC, we were surprised by how many teams didn’t know what a monday.com partner is or that Platinum Partners even exist. A partner isn’t just there to “set things up.” We’re certified experts who design, customize, and scale monday.com so it supports real workflows, real teams, and real change.

As a monday.com Platinum Partner, Polished Geek combines deep platform expertise with process and change management to build systems that actually stick.

If you want to see how this comes to life, watch our on-demand Retail Ops Command Center webinar, featuring an interview with a client who’s scaled monday.com with us: Click this link

TN_MCC Webinar - On-Demand Post 11920×1080 95.6 KB

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Great job guys. Lot of hard work you have put in together.
